column3: Requirement Completeness "Based on the original instruction, which website better covers all the stated requirements?"
column4: Usefulness / Fitness for Purpose "Which website would be more genuinely useful to a real user trying to accomplish the goal described in the instruction?"
column5: Visual Quality & Design "Which website has better visual design, layout harmony, and overall aesthetic quality?"
column6: Navigability & Usability "Which website is easier to navigate and use to accomplish the goal described in the instruction?"
column7: Implementation Depth "Which website provides a more complete and thoughtful implementation, going beyond the minimum requirements?"
column8: Scalability of Implementation "Which website appears better positioned to scale to a larger, more complex application without major rework?"
